# DubCall

> DubCall is an AI voice agent platform built by NextSens Global Pvt. Ltd. (India). Businesses use DubCall to create AI agents that make and answer real phone calls in 32+ languages — including English, Hindi, and regional Indian languages — to qualify leads, book appointments, resolve customer support queries, and close sales, 24×7. Plans start free; paid plans run ₹2,000–₹10,000/month (~$20–$99).

Key facts (as of July 2026):

- ~320ms average response time; sub-second conversational latency with interruption handling, emotion, and contextual memory
- 32+ languages with real-time code-switching mid-conversation
- 99.9% uptime; 1M+ calls capacity; 85%+ task automation
- End-to-end encrypted calls; SOC 2 compliance in progress; customer data is never used to train shared models
- Deploy in under a day with the no-code Agent Studio (pick a voice, define goals, connect integrations, go live)
- Agents take real actions: update CRMs, book calendar slots, send email/SMS, trigger Zapier/Make flows, call any REST API
- Integrations: HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, Zoho, Google Calendar, Gmail, Slack, Stripe, Postgres, SIP trunks, REST API, webhooks
- Industries served: healthcare & medical services, real estate & property management, BFSI/finance, e-commerce
- Customers include Rivet Global, SlateMate, Franchise Batao, and The HNH
- Supported by Cartesia Startups and Nirmaan
- Founders: Pretam Ram (Founder & CEO), Piyush Modi (Co-Founder & CBO)
- Company: NextSens Global Pvt. Ltd., India · Sales: business@dubcall.com · Support: support@dubcall.com

## Pricing (INR, monthly)

- Free — ₹0: 10 plan credits/month, 1 prebuilt agent, browser-based testing, community support
- Starter — ₹2,000/month (~$20): 200 credits, 10 custom agents, 5 SIP trunk providers, 200 MB knowledge base, email support with <24h SLA
- Pro — ₹5,000/month (~$49, most popular): 600 credits, 30 custom agents, 15 SIP trunk providers, 1 GB knowledge base, priority chat support, call recordings & analytics export
- Scale — ₹10,000/month (~$99): 2,000 credits, 100 custom agents, 50 SIP trunk providers, 5 GB knowledge base, dedicated CSM, SLA-backed uptime, SSO (Google/Microsoft)
- Annual billing saves 20% (Starter ₹1,600, Pro ₹4,000, Scale ₹8,000 per month billed annually)
- Credit packs (base rate ₹5/credit; bulk discounts apply to the pack total): 100 credits ₹500; 1,000 credits ₹4,500 (10% off, effective ₹4.50/credit); 3,500 credits ₹14,000 (20% off, effective ₹4/credit); 10,000 credits ₹35,000 (30% off, effective ₹3.50/credit)
- 14-day free trial on every plan, no credit card required; no setup fees; cancel anytime; enterprise custom pricing available

## Pages

- [Home](https://dubcall.com/): Platform overview — "Voice agents that think, talk, and take action"
- [Product](https://dubcall.com/product): Capabilities — intelligent routing, multi-turn conversations, deep integrations, real-time analytics
- [Pricing](https://dubcall.com/pricing): Plans, credit packs, add-ons (dedicated numbers, custom LLMs, white label), FAQ
- [Company](https://dubcall.com/company): About NextSens Global Pvt. Ltd., founders, vision
- [Resources](https://dubcall.com/resources): Guides, blog, industry compliance (HIPAA, finance)
- [Contact](https://dubcall.com/contact): Book a demo or talk to sales
- [Console](https://console.dubcall.com/overview): Sign up and build agents (free plan available)

## FAQ

- What is DubCall? An AI voice agent platform that makes and answers phone calls in 32+ languages, taking real actions like CRM updates and appointment booking — built by NextSens Global Pvt. Ltd. (India).
- How much does DubCall cost? Free plan available; Starter ₹2,000/mo, Pro ₹5,000/mo, Scale ₹10,000/mo. Annual billing saves 20%; credit packs from ₹5/credit.
- How fast can I deploy? Most teams ship their first agent in under a day using Agent Studio — no code required.
- Does it sound human? Sub-second latency with emotion, interruption handling, and contextual memory; most callers can't tell they're speaking with an AI.
- Is it secure? Calls are end-to-end encrypted; SOC 2 compliance is in progress; data stays in your tenant.
